name: Tally
description: Read Tally form submissions and manage forms/workspaces from any AI agent. 6 tools, Bearer-token auth. The modern free-tier-friendly alternative to Typeform.
instructions:
This connector uses the Tally API (developers.tally.so).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://tally.so → top-right avatar → **Settings → API → Create API key**.
2. Copy the key (starts with `tly-`). Set `TALLY_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${TALLY_API_KEY}`.

**Forms and responses**: each form has an alphanumeric ID (e.g. `wbN0Wd`). Responses to a form are returned as an array of `{questionId, answer, type}` per submission.

**Pagination**: cursor-based with `?page=N&limit=M` for submissions. Default 50 per page, max 100.

**Webhooks** out of scope (configure in Tally UI to point at your hosted endpoint).

**Out of scope here**: creating/editing forms (Tally's editor is GUI-only and rich), file uploads, custom integrations.

tools.name: tally_list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces (teams). Returns id, name, slug, isOwner, isLeader.

tools.name: tally_list_forms
tools.description: List forms in a workspace. Each form has id, name, isClosed, numberOfSubmissions, createdAt, updatedAt.

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID to filter (optional — defaults to all).

tools.name: tally_get_form
tools.description: Fetch a form's full definition: questions[], theme, settings, redirectUrl, isClosed.

tools.name: tally_list_form_submissions
tools.description: List submissions to a form. Each submission has id, formId, respondentId, submittedAt, isCompleted, responses[].

tools.name: tally_get_form_submission
tools.description: Fetch a single submission with its full responses[].

tools.name: tally_get_form_questions
tools.description: List the questions defined on a form, with id, type, title, isRequired, options. Required to map answer questionIds to human-readable titles.
